function.name: final_result
function.arguments: {"name":"The Cursed Coast","setting":"A fog-draped coastal city where the dead walk at low tide.","narrator_personality":"Grim and theatrical.","hidden_goal":"Awaken the drowned god.","bbeg_name":"Malachar","bbeg_description":"A lich bound to the tides.","milestones":[{"milestone_id":"m1","title":"First Blood","description":"Survive."},{"milestone_id":"m2","title":"The Cult","description":"Unmask."},{"milestone_id":"m3","title":"Reckoning","description":"Face."}],"target_level":5}
